author: mai

code_bugs.title: Env filter tabs (All/Prod/Staging/Dev) do NOT filter clusters
code_bugs.description: Clicking 'Prod 2', 'Staging 1', or 'Dev 4' tab does not filter the cluster list. All 7 clusters remain visible ('7/7 visible' shown). The active tab highlight may not be updating either.
code_bugs.expected: Clicking 'Prod 2' should show only 2 Production clusters; Staging and Dev groups should be hidden
code_bugs.actual: All 7 clusters remain visible regardless of which env tab is clicked
code_bugs.feature: Consolidated filter UI (env tabs + FilterBar merged)

consolidated_filter_ui.notes: FilterBar (status/provider/health) works. Env tabs UI present but filtering broken.

card_table_view_toggle.notes: Toggle works in both directions. Table shows Name/Provider/Health/Environment/Version/Nodes/CPU. Card view groups by env.

skeleton_loading_states.notes: Could not verify without network throttling. No flash of unstyled content observed.

resource_utilization_bars.notes: All clusters in Error/unreachable state. CPU shows '—'. Cannot verify bars with live data.

simplified_top_bar.notes: Clean minimal bar: Logo, Cluster selector, CPU%, User, Theme toggle, Notifications, Logout, Live status.

compact_anomaly_cards.notes: Compact expandable table rows. Expand shows severity/time/title/description/cluster/actions/metadata grid.

view_before_delete_ordering.notes: Clusters table: 'View cluster X' button appears BEFORE 'Delete cluster X'. Correct P1 ordering.

console_errors.message: EventSource MIME type mismatch on presence.subscribe SSE endpoint
console_errors.notes: Pre-existing infra issue, not v152 regression

issues_summary: BUG-001 [HIGH]: Env filter tabs non-functional — core P1 feature broken
